game.title: Spinbound: The Relics
game.short_text: Spin relics are the basis of power in this world.

details.title: Spinbound: The Relics
details.description:
Vampire vs Hunters • Boss-Rush • Pixel-Art Shooter
       
Space -> dash
lmb -> shot
rmb -> charge shot
-You are the Nightborne Vampire wielding the cursed Cross-Engine. Spin it. Charge it. Release crimson torrents of blood-fired bullets. Face wave after wave of relentless Hunter Bosses and survive with only your wits and weapon.-




Spin the Cross-Engine: A dynamic weapon that charges energy and unleashes powerful crimson blasts.


Boss Rush Chaos: 3 high-intensity boss fights — no filler waves, just raw combat.Dark Vampire Theme: Embrace your vampiric power, face elite vampire hunters, and bathe the field in gore.


Pixel Art + Shader Drama: Hand-crafted pixel art combined with shader effects for a gritty, visceral look.


Fast, Brutal Sessions: Perfect for single-sitting thrills (30-60 minutes of action).

game.title: CRAPSHOOT - Playtesting Build
game.short_text: Gamble for your life, gamble with your loadout.

details.title: CRAPSHOOT - Playtesting Build
details.description:
Crapshoot is a high-stakes boss rush FPS. 
Arm yourself with a slot machine gun, spin for unpredictable combos, and take on surreal casino-inspired bosses. Bet your winnings to make the fights deadlier and the payouts bigger.

Playtesting Build
Crapshoot is in active development, this build is constantly being updated with new features, content, and bugfixes. It may be slightly unstable.
You can wishlist the release version of Crapshoot here.
Make Your Own Luck
You’re a card cheat, caught red handed at a strange mega-casino that’s a law unto itself. Dragged off into a backroom by some well-muscled goons, to meet the mysterious owner Mr. Big. 
He  gives you a choice: a long drive and short dig - or you can fight for  your freedom in the megacasino’s closed-circuit bloodsport. 

Rig The Odds
Your gun has 3 roller slots, each roller holds many possible effects that change how your shots behave. 

Earn new rollers by defeating bosses, or buy them with your hard earned chips. Choose your loadout, and spin the rollers to stack up to 3 effects at once.

Beat The House
Face up against the biggest threats the megacasino can throw at you in a fast-paced boss rush, with a rogues' gallery of  enforcers, freaks, mutants, and mercs.

game.title: The wheel
game.short_text: Inside the wheel that spins over and over, face and defeat ruthless and strange opponents!

details.title: The wheel
details.description:
Inside the wheel that spins over and over, face and defeat ruthless and strange opponents !
Controls :
Mouse           |           Joystick + button A           |           Touchscreen

Translated into 14 languages !

Game rules:What's red hurts you!What's blue is vulnerable - hit it!Activate the yellow platforms to make the boss vulnerable.When the hourglass runs out, the boss becomes invulnerable again.Collect hearts to regain life.The order of the bosses is random, but they're getting harder and harder to beat !Beat all five bosses to win !

There's even a speedrun mode

A game created in a month for Boss Rush Jam 2025 with the theme: Rotation.The game was created almost entirely live on Twitch ( https://www.twitch.tv/douckdouck )I did all the code, graphic assets and music. I recorded some of the sounds (notably the bosses' voices), the rest came from https://pixabay.com/ and a little from https://lasonotheque.org/, and some were modified on Audacity.I used the Construct 3 game engine, the graphics were created with Aseprite and the music was done with FL Studio.Font : BreamcatcherCredits : Harold GEORGE

Welcome Player to the intergalactic showdown of a lifetime! Play for the fate of your planet in this wacky boss-rush roulette roguelite battle royal!

game.short_text: This fish will die if you stop spinning it.

details.title: This Fish Is Gonna Spin
details.description:
Game Description


This Fish Is Gonna Spin is a Boss Rush game featuring two unique bosses, each with their own distinct attacks and three challenging phases.



The main objective is to spin and shoot bubbles to defeat your enemies. The game includes various tricks and features that make each playthrough feel fresh and slightly different.





Additionally, This Fish Is Gonna Spin includes a leaderboard system, allowing you to submit your score after completing the game and compete with players around the world for the highest score.

Other
This Fish Is Gonna Spin was developed for a game jam. I would love to hear your feedback and thoughts!

game.title: Kiskadeal With It
game.short_text: Cuphead-inspired bird game.

details.title: Kiskadeal With It
details.description:
This game was made for the 2025 Boss Rush Jam! Theme: SPIN
Kiskadeal With It is a single-player game strictly focused on boss battles. The game's standout feature is its unique attack mechanic, which relies on the player's rotational flight speed to damage the boss, which is complemented by its amazing digital art style.

Play as a little great kiskadee (or perhaps just little kiskadee) who uses its beak as a weapon, powered by the centrifugal force of its spinning flight. Build up speed by flying in circles, then unleash the full force of your momentum on your enemies. (It’s the least a bird could do to recover its beautiful eggs!)


Este jogo foi feito para a Boss Rush Jam de 2025! Tema: GIRAR
Kiskadeal With It ( Bem-Te-Vira ) é um jogo single-player focado estritamente em batalhas contra chefões. O destaque do jogo é sua mecânica única de ataque, que depende da velocidade giratória do voo do jogador para ferir o chefão, que é complementado pelo lindo estilo de arte digital.
Jogue como um bem-te... -vizinho? Bem-te-vinho? Um bem-te-vi pequenininho que utiliza seu bico como arma, fortalecido pelo embalo giratório de seu voo.  Aumente sua velocidade com o movimento circular, e então libere toda sua força centrífuga nos inimigos. (O mínimo que uma ave faria para recuperar seus lindos ovos!)
INTRUCTIONS  /  INSTRUÇÕES :
KEYS / TECLAS :ENGLISH :PORTUGUÊS :Wto FLYpara VOARAmove LEFTmover p/ ESQUERDADmove RIGHTmover p/ DIREITASto LANDpara POUSARJto start SPINNING DIVEpara começar o EMABLO GIRATÓRIOKto PARRY green objectspara APARAR objetos verdesPto PAUSEpara PAUSARW -> A -> S -> D -> W...to SPIN while divingpara GIRAR enquanto no embalo
CREDITS / CRÉDITOS :
Art & Animation / Game Design / SFX / Coding: by lokopontoMusic: by C.A.Na.Ro.( scroll down to read the english install instructions )
PORTUGUÊS:
 Baixe o ZIP: Clique no botão de download para baixar o arquivo ZIP do jogo.
Extraia o Arquivo: Encontre o arquivo ZIP baixado, clique com o botão direito e selecione "Extrair aqui" ou "Extrair para uma pasta".
Execute o Jogo: Abra a pasta extraída e clique duas vezes no arquivo executável do jogo "Windows KiskadealWithIt.exe".

Se ao executar aparecer a mensagem "O Windows protegeu seu computador", siga estes passos:
Clique em "Mais informações"
Clique no botão "Executar assim mesmo".

Não se preocupe; o jogo não contém malware.
ENGLISH:
 Download the ZIP File: Click the download button to install the game's ZIP file.
Extract the File: Locate the downloaded ZIP file, right-click on it, and select "Extract Here" or "Extract to a Folder."
Run the Game: Open the extracted folder and double-click the game's executable file, "Windows KiskadealWithIt.exe."

If the message "Windows protected your PC" appears when you try to run the game, follow these steps:
Click "More Info"
Click the "Run Anyway" button.

Don't worry; the game does not contain malware.

game.title: Spiral Counter
game.short_text: You've been chained up within a tower, with nothing but your tail to parry attacks.

details.title: Spiral Counter
details.description:
Download the game for a smoother experience 

You've been chained up within a tower, with nothing but your tail to parry attacks.
Take revenge on those who would keep you shackled and make your escape.
Spin clockwise to parry a clockwise attack (indicated by red), and counterclockwise to parry a counterclockwise attack (indicated by blue). Every attack can be parried.


Controls:
Right Click/RB - Spin Clockwise
Left Click/LB - Spin Counterclockwise
WASD/Left Joystick - Move
Escape/P/Start - Pause
E/Right Face Button - Interact
F/Select - Fullscreen
C/Top Face Button - Hide/Show Controls
Made in one month for the 2025 Boss Rush Jam 

Post Jam Changes-Made tutorial more clear

-Improved performance 

-Fixed some bugs

-Adjusted some colors to be more vibrant, mostly to help distinguish the red and blue from each other more

-Removed easy mode, normal mode now starts the player off with 8 hearts, and hard mode now starts the player with 4 hearts

-Added godmode option

-Added option to skip bosses

-Added boss health bars for second and third boss

-First boss’s shield’s hp slightly reduced in some areas

-Second boss has less downtime between attacks

-Second boss head slowed a bit during the damage phase

-Second boss attack phases reduced from 3 to 2, second phase will now trigger at exactly half health 

-Slight change to second boss’s attack pattern 

-Third boss memory game projectiles are now slowly turn the color they are rotating.This is to give the players more of a chance to still parry them even if they fail the memory test. The projectiles are also a little slower

-Third boss memory test color glare lasts a little longer

-Third boss portals now appear from left to right to make memorization more intuitive 

-Slowed down the third boss stage hazards a little, no longer speeds them up at (outside of hard mode)

-Small animation changes to third boss

resultData.title: S P I N F I N I T Y (check the devlog info pease)

game.title: S P I N F I N I T Y (check the devlog info pease)
game.short_text: It's time to beat the boss!

details.title: S P I N F I N I T Y (check the devlog info pease)
details.description:
Are you ready for the most intense space battle of your life?Please Before...
Let me share with you the story of how this game was made. Thank you in advance for your time! :)

As soon as I saw the announcement, I was thrilled because this theme is exactly my thing, and I love creating in this genre. My brainstorming started immediately. A huge thanks to the organizers for this fantastic opportunity! Ever since I saw the announcement, I haven’t been able to stop thinking about it for a single moment. I truly hope the results will show, and you’ll enjoy the game!


I am a hobbyist game developer. I have loved this world since childhood, but in my everyday life, I work as a driver so that I don’t spend my entire life in front of a computer. Managing my free time to work on this project while having a job was no small feat. I could only start developing the game in the middle of the month, and there were moments when I almost gave up (NO, NEVER!). But, thanks to the Creator, I managed to hand over my job to a dear friend for a week, allowing me to fully dedicate myself to the JAM. Right now, the core structure of the game is ready, but I have yet to design a single boss. I’ll have about 3-4 days for that (since I’m writing this on the afternoon of the 29th). If you’ve seen Back to the Future, you know the quote: "Why do we always have to leave everything to the last minute?" That’s exactly how I feel right now. Welcome to my life! :P

Although I didn’t use AI for game development (as per the rules), I did use it for brainstorming and inspiration. It would have been nice to save time this way, but to comply with the requirements, I drew everything myself. 90% of the graphics in the game are entirely my own work, including the elements you see on this page, like the cover image.

I needed audio that perfectly fits the game’s dynamic style. Who else could I think of first but my best bro Daniel, whose days have never gone by without FL Studio being open for years now? He primarily helped me structure my envisioned compositions. Additionally, I used my own assets primarily and some old unused stuff. Another thing came to mind—previously, we organized a Cyberpunk-themed audio bundle featuring Intersonic, Magory, Jake-Bradford Sharp, and Stormwave audio. Their work provided an excellent foundation, and I highly recommend checking out their pages here on itch.io! If anyone wants to organize another bundle, let me know, I'm in! :)

Money has never been my main motivation. While I appreciate the prize money for this competition and acknowledge it as extra motivation, what truly matters to me is TIME.  An IMPORTANT INFO about time:I worked on the game alone alongside my job, for about half of the month, so I didn't have enough time to properly finish it or dedicate time to testing. :( As a result, there may be bugs or missing features. Thank you for your understanding—I appreciate any feedback! Hopefully, you won’t find any major issues. :)I originally envisioned the game to be much more ambitious, with far more creative mechanics, but this is what I could fit into the available time. I had to wrap it up as it is—for example, my goal was to include 25 unique enemies, each with their own spinning mechanics, but perhaps one day in the future, I’ll get the chance to bring that vision to life.
I hope you will enjoy the game! Whether you love it or not, don’t hesitate to flood the comment section! :P I know this whole thing is one big TL;DR, and maybe no one reads anymore in this world, but if someone does, thank you so much for reading!

game.title: Gyroneer
game.short_text: Spin Platforms To Evade Attacks

details.title: Gyroneer
details.description:
Performance
Game may run slow on some browsers depending on your device, so I would recommend downloading the executable for the smoothest experience (if the game feels slow and floaty it will be a problem with the browser)
About
The art, code and design was all done by myself (Platypus)
Daver The Dave was the composer and made the entirety of the music
The game includes 3 different bosses each with 2 phases and their own music as well as a challenge variant of boss 2 which may be extremely difficult to beat.
----------------------------------------------
Controls
W and D - Move left and rightSpace - Jump (and double jump when available)Left Click - Spin platform anticlockwiseRight Click - Spin platform clockwiseS - Heal (Costs 4 Points)Shift - Attack (Costs 2 Points)W - Enter Spin Mode ALT + ENTER - Fullscreen if using the downloaded version
----------------------------------------------
Too Difficult?
While play testing the game I got a lot of practice in and this may have led to me underestimating the difficulty of the bosses. If this is the case here are some useful tips to help you out!
Try learning the bosses in easy mode, their attacks will be slower and more forgivingYou are immune while attacking and for a few frames afterwards so you can use this to attack a boss safely through its own attacksMake good use of your double jump by repeatedly spinning platforms to refresh itUse your spin mode (W key) wisely as it can deal a massive amount of damage, while a boss is entering its second phase is usually a good window while it is stillRepeatedly spinning a platform while you are on the side or bottom allows you to cling to the side of the platformYou can watch my video of me fighting the bosses if you are struggling to figure out how the attacks should be dodged You can use the boss select mode to practice against a specific boss, the triangle boss is the easiest to might be a good one to start with
----------------------------------------------
Assets Used
The only pre-made assets used were a selection of sound effects from this collection https://archive.org/details/TheEssentialRetroVideoGameSoundEffectsCollection512S...

Made for Boss Rush Game Jam 2025:

Choose your weapons and take on four perilous bosses, themed after planets in a bullet hell format with a unique movement system.
Known Issues:

Holding Space while going through portals makes character disappear (all builds and all computers)
Sometimes bosses are skipped in Boss Rush Mode (seems computer dependent)
Sometimes the selection menu after Planet X causes the game to crash (seems computer dependent)
For a more stable game in general, we recommend Windows, and all of the post-build bugs appear to be with the Boss Rush mode, so if you are having issues, you can still fight the bosses through the Library.

Move in or out - W/S

Rotate player - A/D

Switch direction - Shift

Dash - Hold Space

game.title: Rhythm Royale
game.short_text: A Rhythm-Action Game made for Boss Rush Jam 2025

details.title: Rhythm Royale
details.description:
[ STORY ]
If you want to make it in the music biz, you've got to prove your groove in a musical battle against the dopest dancers in the world!
In Rhythm Royale, you play as a DJ. Your opponents will perform a dance and you must match their moves with your weapon of choice - your turntable. Scratch to the beat to keep the party going!
The twist? You've got to fight them ALL. AT. ONCE. As the battle progresses, your opponents will rotate out and hit you with new tracks and new dances. 
[ CONTROLS ]
< LEFT CLICK & HOLD > on the turntable to grab the disk
< SWIPE CLOCKWISE / COUNTER-CLOCKWISE > to SCRATCH the disk to the beat

game.title: Buffoons
game.short_text: Come and join the circus.

details.title: Buffoons
details.description:
HELLO, lil’clowny fella! Welcome to Buffoons, a side scroller 2D platform boss rush game submitted for the Boss Rush Jam 2025. I own the place (not really) and will be your host tonight!



This little clumsy clown works at MY casino and accidentally committed a serious mistake. Now if you don’t wanna get fired, you’ll have to play the whipping boy for a bunch of games, to test if they're not “too deadly” for my new customers. Will you survive? Will you be able to finish all the Bosses? Will the casino’s legal team have to deal with this? Press start and try not to die! (Of fun?)


Explosives, general trickery, squeaky weapons, clown-on-clown violence.



 100% original pixel art and animationsOriginal soundtrack and SFXGoofy dangerous ClownsThe Super Duper Bonkin’ Clown-Boss Fight Roulette!




This one is a crybaby. Unfortunately they didn’t go to therapy, and now it sounds like a you-problem.



What in the Clown’s red circus are they always laughing about? Seems like they have some cards up their sleeve, watch out…



They are so mysterious and elegant. I like their style, but even I am afraid of them sometimes. Good luck with them, little clown!


Now make some nooooise for the buffoons that made this game possible! Round of applause, ladies, and gentlemen, theys and thems! (But not too much, I live for the applause, thank you S2)

game.title: Casino of Suits
game.short_text: Wake up in a casino and spin the wheel to fight anime girls in suits.

details.title: Casino of Suits
details.description:
After winning it big, you wake up in a casino as an amnesiac. Why? Who knows? more importantly, who cares...? All you know is that you want out, and to get out, you must defeat three different anime girls at their wheel-spinning game to get to the fourth floor for a chance at getting out. Let me OUTTTTTTTTT-
 Warning:The game contains flashing lights and mildly disturbing imagery (if you're unlucky). Also, I do not condone IRL gambling. Don't do it. You're going to lose.
Losing causes you to restart from the first boss, so play on EASY MODE if you want to restart from the current boss and have an easier time overall.
 Features:- anime girls in suits (this is probably what you're here for) and one ending CG- the casino aesthetic, but not like the modern ones. no, we're classy.- unusually smooth animations. you will likely never get this from me ever again.- skill-based combat? you spin a wheel (even this is kind of a lie)- heavy RNG so that each run is... mildly different- a total of 17 skills across all bosses to experience (and probably hate)- an easy mode (this will be patched-out post-jam so enjoy it while it lasts)- the worst soundtrack I've ever written in my life... sorry.- DO NOT STOP ON THE OLD MAID CARD. YOU WILL REGRET IT.
 Controls:Left-click for menus. [ESC] to pause. Skills correspond to [a], [s], [d], [f] in that order. Hit [SPACE] to start and stop the spinner.
 Credits:Game made in Godot Engine (by me). Art done in Firealpaca (also by me). Music and SFX in Garageband or recorded (still by me).
Fonts used are Libre Baskerville in-game and Lucida Bright for text on UI elements.
Thank you to wispify and Yurd for playtesting!NOTE: THE GAME DOES NOT HAVE SAVE FILES. QUITTING OUT OF THE GAME FROM EITHER QUIT BUTTON MEANS YOU MUST START OVER.
For Windows:Unzip and extract the zip file. Double-click on Casino of Suits.exe to run.  Check the readme.txt for instructions if you forget how to play somehow. Select your difficulty wisely.
For MacOS:Double-click the zip file and watch it spawn the app (wow!). Run it at your own risk.
Asset Pack:Not required for game to run, only download if you wanna take a look at the sprites or use them in a thumbnail or something.

game.title: 「CODENAME: CRANE」
game.short_text: Explore the early years of the Angelic invasion.

details.title: 「CODENAME: CRANE」
details.description:
EARLY ACCESS
The early years of the invasion by the Angels were a time of great violence. Entire ecosystems and cities were destroyed upon their arrival. You are a human that has partnered with an Ishim to pilot her shell. Your mission is to stop the violence. 
「Codename: Crane」 is an STG currently in development. Full stages and more bosses are in active development. 

Paying for the game gets you access to all future versions of the game. Your contribution supports the active development of 「Codename: Crane」.
There is no planned release date. The developer is very busy with school, but spends each break working on this title. Check the devlog for updates and follow the developer on social media for perhaps more updates. 

Version 1.6.2 is a complete and ready to play package of the boss rush mode. 
Stories from the Angelic Dominion
Visitors, a complimentary album. Listen to the sounds of people dealing with the early and later days of the Angelic invasion.

Please access the game settings by pressing start or esc when the game launches. 
 This game will work with proton or wine. Try proton experimental if the first proton version you try doesn't work.

game.title: Spinbuster
game.short_text: Pilot the Spinbuster, Earth's ultimate weapon and last chance for survival.

details.title: Spinbuster
details.description:
Humanity faces extinction at the hands of a mysterious foe. 
Harnessing the power of the SPIN, what remains of humanity has forged its final weapon. The revolutionary war machine: SPINBUSTER. 
Pilot the Spinbuster. Destroy the enemy. Keep the Earth spinning.
This game was developed in three weeks as an entry for the Boss Rush Jam 2025 using SPIN as its central theme.

MoveWASDAttackLeft Click/Left Alt


TIPS

The Spinbuster's charge attack has three levels. The first level, while weak, can help you destroy bullets in a pinch. The second level is a great mid-distance dodge, while the third level packs the hardest punch.

Don't underestimate your base movement. While slow, it allows for more precise dodging, which is crucial for surviving dangerous bullet barrages.


Credits:
Artist - EzzyDrawsDeveloper - Ruin13

With Music by DavidKBD and Sound Effects by Dan Harbaugh and Helton Yan
